overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hunter character wading and swimming through a turquoise tropical jungle waterway with a massive waterfall backdrop. The character carries a large weapon on their back and eventually meets a companion riding a mount, traveling together into a shaded canyon area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical jungle pool with large waterfall

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through waist-deep turquoise water toward a massive misty waterfall while carrying a large weapon on their back

entered.detail: massive multi-tiered waterfall cascading down rocky cliffs with mist rising from the base
broken wooden scaffolding or platform partially submerged in the water
steep rocky cliff face covered with dense tropical vegetation
lush palm trees and broadleaf plants lining the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character wades through crystal-clear turquoise water in a wide jungle pool, approaching a magnificent waterfall that dominates the background. Wooden debris floats on the left while dense tropical vegetation lines the right cliff face under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open jungle waterway between cliff formations

events.description: large waterfall exits view behind as character moves deeper into the open water

agents.ego_description: swimming through deeper open water toward distant canyon formations

entered.detail: misty mountain peaks and rock formations visible in the far distance
small patch of trees and bushes growing on a rocky outcrop in the water

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the waterfall, the character swims through open water toward distant rock formations. The environment opens up with small vegetated islands visible in the water while the right cliff face moves closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water beach approach with sandy shoreline

events.description: character stands up from swimming to wading as water becomes shallow
companion character on a mount enters view from the left side

agents.ego_description: standing up in shallow water and approaching the sandy beach while looking toward the canyon ahead

notable_agents.action: companion character riding a bird-like mount through the water toward the ego character

entered.detail: white sandy beach forming the water's edge along the canyon entrance
group of palm trees growing on the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The water grows shallow and the character stands up, wading toward a sandy beach at the canyon entrance. A companion on a mount approaches from the left, and the canyon walls draw closer as they prepare to enter the narrower passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded jungle canyon waterway with steep rock walls

events.description: entering heavily shaded canyon area with significantly reduced sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge accompanied by the mounted companion into the darker canyon depths

notable_agents.action: companion riding alongside on a mount, matching pace with the ego character through the canyon

entered.detail: tall steep rock walls forming the narrow canyon passage
dense vines and vegetation hanging down from the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character and their mounted companion enter a narrow, shaded canyon with steep rock walls blocking most of the sky. The water grows deeper again as they move through the dimly lit passage with hanging vines visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open tropical lagoon toward the dim interior of a narrow rock canyon. It begins with the character wading through crystal-clear turquoise water toward a magnificent waterfall, with wooden debris and dense vegetation lining the sunlit pool. As the character swims away from the falls, the environment opens up to reveal small vegetated islands and distant rock formations before the water grows shallow. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a sandy beach and meets a companion on a mount, with the surrounding canyon walls drawing closer. Finally, the pair enters a narrow, shaded passage where the sky is blocked by steep cliffs and the water deepens amidst hanging vines and dim lighting.
